scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,agent,admin -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev -w apps/api" "npm run dev -w apps/agent" "npm run dev -w apps/admin"
scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/agent && npm run build -w apps/admin
scripts.deploy:agent: npm run build -w apps/agent && cd apps/agent && firebase deploy --only hosting
scripts.deploy:admin: npm run build -w apps/admin && cd apps/admin && firebase deploy --only hosting
scripts.deploy:all: npm run deploy:agent && npm run deploy:admin && npm run deploy:api
